rationale.R1.5: The agent suggested several prose-level edits and improvements but did not propose a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged multiple uncertain claims and provided detailed suggestions for improvement, marking confidence and missing evidence appropriately.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed entirely within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; the agent identified potential issues in the original text that could lead to overinterpretation.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits were not, and not every non-cosmetic change was annotated with source and reason.
